item.title: Premium Wooden Sofa - Modern Design
item.description: Elegant wooden sofa crafted from premium hardwood with contemporary design. Features comfortable seating for 3-4 people with high-quality upholstery and durable construction. Perfect for living rooms.

item.title: Wooden Dining Table with 6 Chairs
item.description: Complete dining set with solid wood dining table and 6 matching chairs. Ideal for family meals and gatherings. Sturdy construction ensures long-lasting durability and classic aesthetic appeal.

item.title: Carved Wooden Bed Frame - Queen Size
item.description: Beautiful carved wooden bed frame with intricate traditional patterns. Spacious queen size perfect for master bedrooms. Handcrafted details and premium wood construction provide elegance and comfort.

item.title: Wooden Bookshelf with 5 Shelves
item.description: Tall wooden bookshelf with 5 adjustable shelves for organizing books and decorative items. Crafted from sustainable hardwood with a natural finish. Perfect for home libraries and offices.

item.title: Wooden Coffee Table with Storage
item.description: Stylish coffee table featuring built-in storage compartments. Perfect for living rooms to hold magazines, remotes, and other essentials. Made from durable hardwood with contemporary design.
